snippets.title: Aaron Levie on enterprise and models
snippets.takeaway: We now have de facto AI regulation. It’s not obvious why from here on out models that have certain levels of capability or are trained on certain compute sizes won’t have to be...
snippets.summary: Aaron Levie (levie on X) shared 2 recent updates. We now have de facto AI regulation. It’s not obvious why from here on out models that have certain levels of capability or are trained on certain compute sizes won’t have to be reviewed by the government before release. Realistically, as AI models became more and more powerful this was going to be inevitable (I think it’s too early, but here we are).

snippets.title: Aditya Agarwal on enterprise
snippets.takeaway: It is stupidly hard to start a pure software company right now. Customers don't want software, they want outcomes. So you end up having to do a lot of custom work for them.
snippets.summary: Aditya Agarwal (adityaag on X) shared 1 recent update. It is stupidly hard to start a pure software company right now. Customers don't want software, they want outcomes. So you end up having to do a lot of custom work for them. Anything horizontal is on a ticking clock. Every customer wants to deeply customize. There are opportunities. But you need to have a very heretical 2-3 year view of the world in order to build something good.

snippets.title: Building intelligent apps for Apple platforms with Claude in the Foundation Models framework
snippets.takeaway: Building intelligent apps for Apple platforms with Claude in the Foundation Models framework. Today we're releasing Foundation Models framework support for Claude through a...
snippets.summary: Building intelligent apps for Apple platforms with Claude in the Foundation Models framework. Today we're releasing Foundation Models framework support for Claude through a new Swift package that lets Apple developers use Apple's Foundation Models framework to call Claude for more complex workflows. Apple’s Foundation Models framework gives developers access to tap into models natively from Swift.

snippets.sourceName: The MAD Podcast with Matt Turck
snippets.title: Cloudflare CEO: Bot Takeover, Edge AI & The Hard Decision Every CEO Will Face
snippets.takeaway: Cloudflare CEO: Bot Takeover, Edge AI & The Hard Decision Every CEO Will Face. For the first time, the number of bots and AI agents has outnumbered humans on the Internet.
snippets.summary: For the first time, the number of bots and AI agents has outnumbered humans on the Internet. The the cost of all these tokens just, know, it can can be just overwhelming and it's really easy for that to lose for you to lose control of that. But it turns out that, you know, if you think of it sort of x y axis and you know, the x axis is is budget and the y axis is is like security issues.
entities: The MAD Podcast with Matt Turck
